source_jobs.title: VP Product – AI for Precision Medicine
source_jobs.description:
VP PRODUCT – AI FOR PRECISION MEDICINE




THE ROLE

We are looking for a senior, software-native execution leader with strong medical domain expertise to join our leadership team and report directly to the Founder & CEO.

This role combines product leadership with strong operational execution and medical understanding. This role combines strategic product leadership with hands-on operational execution. You will take ownership of how software products and projects are built, delivered, and scaled at Mindpeak.




YOUR MISSION

Your mission is to ensure that strategy turns into reliable execution.

You will build and scale the operating backbone of our software organization by introducing clear ownership, predictable delivery, and sustainable leadership structures.

At the same time, you genuinely enjoy enabling others. You see developing junior leaders not as a side task, but as a central responsibility. You actively coach, mentor, and empower team leads to grow into confident, accountable, high-performing managers.




THIS MEANS:

 - Bringing clarity to priorities: grounded in medical relevance and real clinical impact

 - Introducing pragmatic, software-native processes suited for regulated medical AI

 - Ensuring commitments are met and accountability is lived across teams

 - Embedding execution discipline into daily operations without creating bureaucracy

 - Actively mentoring and enabling junior leaders, helping them grow into confident, capable decision-makers

You are someone who does not just design systems, you make them stick. And you take pride in growing the people who run them.




WHAT YOU’LL DO




LEADERSHIP & ENABLEMENT

 - Lead and mentor 4 direct reports (team/project leads) and support a group of approximately 10–15 team members across multiple project teams.

 - Actively coach junior leaders, helping them grow in ownership, decision-making, and communication.

 - Establish a strong leadership culture focused on accountability, clarity, and mutual support.
   Create an environment where leaders are empowered, not dependent.

 - You have a genuine passion for developing people and take pride in seeing others grow under your guidance.
   
   


PRODUCT & DELIVERY EXCELLENCE

 - Professionalize our product and project delivery setup.

 - Introduce clear prioritization frameworks and operating rhythms.

 - Ensure alignment between medical, regulatory, engineering, and commercial perspectives.

 - Balance agility with regulatory rigor (ISO 13485, IVDR, FDA environments).

 - Ensure reliable execution, predictable delivery, and high product quality.

 - Ensure that once processes are introduced, they are sustainably implemented and followed.

This role is about making sure “the PS get on the road” and stay there.




MEDICAL & DOMAIN LEADERSHIP

 - Bring strong medical understanding into product discussions and prioritization.

 - Translate clinical requirements into structured product decisions.

 - Ensure that our AI solutions reflect real-world clinical workflows and medical needs.

 - Act as a credible sparring partner to medical stakeholders and clinical partners.

You understand not only how software is built, but also how medicine works.




SOFTWARE-NATIVE OPERATIONS

 - Design and implement pragmatic, non-dogmatic agile or hybrid delivery models suited for regulated AI software.
   Ensure QMS and regulatory processes are actually followed in daily work.

 - Improve transparency across projects, documentation systems, and cross-functional collaboration.

 - Create clear feedback loops and KPIs for delivery performance.

You understand how modern software products are built and you know why rigid waterfall approaches fail in dynamic environments.




STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP

 - Act as sparring partner to the CEO on product direction, organizational structure, and scaling decisions.

 - Contribute to long-term operating model design.

 - Align product, engineering, regulatory, and commercial priorities.

source_jobs.title: Head of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
HEAD OF ENGINEERING



Company Overview

Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based AI company applying state-of-the-art deep learning to computational pathology, with a clear mission: enabling more effective, personalized cancer treatment.

We work at the intersection of AI, medicine, and drug development-building regulatory-grade solutions that help pharma, biotech, and clinical partners discover, validate, and translate meaningful biomarkers into real-world impact.

Our technology analyzes H&E, IHC, and multiplex tissue data to support drug development, patient stratification, and clinical trials. What makes this work especially rewarding: our AI is already deployed in routine diagnostics in more than 25 countries, meaning the tools we build are used by clinicians and patients every day.

At Mindpeak, we believe that reliable, clinically applicable AI can change how cancer is treated. If you want to work on challenging problems, collaborate across disciplines, and see your work make a real difference in patient care, you’ll feel at home here.



The Role

You will lead and develop our Engineering organization, helping teams operate with greater clarity, accountability, and effectiveness.

Your mission is to ensure our software engineering runs reliably today while building the foundation for future growth. You will help the team deliver predictably, raise quality and ownership, and connect software engineering decisions closely to customer and business needs. You will shape the evolution of our AI-assisted software development lifecycle, driving Engineering to embrace and adopt new ways of building software while ensuring high quality, robustness and reliability, and at substantially increased speed.

You will work closely with Product, Machine Learning, Clinical and QA/Regulatory teams.



What You'll Do


BUILD AND STRENGTHEN THE ENGINEERING TEAM

 - Lead, coach, and develop engineers

 - Establish a culture of accountability, trust, and continuous improvement

 - Architect a high-performing team; attract, hire, and retain exceptional talent


CREATE STRUCTURE AND CLARITY

 - Establish clear ownership, responsibilities, and improved ways of working

 - Improve planning, prioritization, and execution

 - Help teams focus on the highest-impact work

 - Apply AI-assistance in all steps of the Software-Development-Lifecycle


BUILD A RELIABLE ENGINEERING ORGANIZATION

 - Increase predictability and transparency of delivery

 - Ensure issues and risks are surfaced early, communicated clearly and openly to relevant stakeholders

 - Create an environment where teams consistently deliver high-quality outcomes


DEVELOP PEOPLE AND FUTURE LEADERS

 - Provide coaching, feedback, and career development

 - Support individual growth and leadership development

 - Raise the overall capability of the engineering organization, esp. AI-assisted software development


STRENGTHEN CROSS-FUNCTIONAL COLLABORATION

 - Improve alignment between Engineering, Product, Clinical, Regulatory, and Commercial teams

 - Remove organizational friction and close communication gaps

 - Share global context to ensure engineering stays closely connected to customer and business needs

 - Challenge Product building the RIGHT THING, and Engineering building it the RIGHT WAY
   
   

What Success Looks Like After 12 Months

 - Engineering teams operate with clear ownership and accountability

 - Delivery is more predictable and transparent

 - Productivity has increased using AI-assistance while ensuring high quality and full human code accountability

 - The organization has successfully grown through strong hires

 - Team engagement and retention remain high

 - Collaboration across functions is significantly stronger

 - Engineers spend less time firefighting and more time creating value for customers (<30% unplannable work)

 - Engineering decisions are strongly connected to customer and business impact.

 - The team has developed a stronger ownership mindset across funct

source_jobs.title: Pathologist (AI & Digital Pathology)
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based scale-up at the forefront of AI-driven cancer diagnostics. Our software helps pathologists analyze medical images more efficiently and accurately - already clinically deployed in more than 25 countries. Our vision is to enable personalized and effective treatment for every cancer patient - to truly improve medical care and patient outcomes around the world.




POSITION SUMMARY

As a Pathologist at Mindpeak, you will play a central role in ensuring the medical quality and reliability of our AI systems.

You will act as the internal medical source of truth, owning annotation quality, model validation, and medical decision-making. This is a hands-on role with a strong focus on execution, where you will directly shape how pathology expertise is translated into scalable, regulatory-ready AI systems.

At this stage, we are moving from individual-driven decisions to structured, system-based medical processes. You will be a key driver in building these systems and ensuring consistent, high-quality outcomes across projects.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Act as the internal reference and source of truth for pathology-related topics

 - Perform medical review and validation of annotations and AI model outputs

 - Own annotation quality and consistency across projects

 - Define, implement, and maintain annotation guidelines, scoring systems, and QC processes

 - Lead and support annotation projects (e.g. tumor grading, biomarker scoring)

 - Ensure predictable quality and throughput in medical workflows

 - Build and improve structured, scalable, and regulatory-ready processes

 - Support onboarding and guidance of internal and external annotators

 - Collaborate closely with ML, Product, and Project teams to translate medical requirements into AI systems

 - Contribute to model evaluation and clinical relevance assessments

 - (Optional) Support customer interactions, expert calls, or conferences as a medical expert
   


YOUR PROFILE

 - Board-certified or near-certified Pathologist

 - Strong clinical background in general anatomic pathology

 - High medical judgment and quality standards

 - Strong attention to detail and consistency

 - Hands-on mindset: you actively engage in annotation, review, and execution

 - Structured thinker with the ability to build guidelines and processes

 - Ability to translate medical requirements into technical systems

 - Comfortable working in ambiguous, fast-paced environments

 - Strong sense of ownership and accountability

 - Clear and pragmatic communicator

Nice to have:

 - Experience with annotation workflows and scoring systems (e.g. Gleason, H-score)

 - Exposure to AI/ML or data-driven medical projects

 - Oncology experience

 - Experience in digital pathology

 - Experience with mIF

 - Experience in pharma or clinical trials

 - Interest in contributing to team scaling and leadership
   
   


WHAT MINDPEAK OFFERS

 - The opportunity to build AI systems that power both clinical cancer diagnostics and data-driven drug development.

 - An open, creative work environment with flat hierarchies and quick decision-making.

 - Diverse, engaging projects that help you deepen both your technical and domain expertise.

 - A centrally located Hamburg office with a beautiful view over the harbor.
   
   

Application Details
Please apply via our website including documents like CV, university certificates, transcripts, references, salary expectations, and earliest start date.
Contact: jobs@mindpeak.ai

Website: mindpeak.ai http://mindpeak.ai

Note: Direct applicants only; agencies are not considered.

source_jobs.title: (Senior) Full-stack Developer - Backend Focus (Python)
source_jobs.description:
(Senior) Full-stack Developer - Backend Focus (Python)



Company Overview:
Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based scale-up at the forefront of AI-driven cancer diagnostics. Our software helps pathologists analyze medical images more efficiently and accurately - already clinically deployed in more than 25 countries. Our vision is to enable personalized and effective treatment for every cancer patient - to truly improve medical care and patient outcomes around the world.



Position Summary:

As a Full-Stack Developer within the ML team, you’ll play a key role in designing and building the software systems that power our AI models — from database and API development to workflow automation and UI integration. You’ll collaborate closely with our ML engineers to connect engineering excellence with cutting-edge medical AI.

Please note: This is an onsite position in Hamburg.



You’ll work on:

 - Designing and implementing robust backend services and databases for AI pipelines, model results, and clinical data.

 - Developing and maintaining scalable, containerized systems (Docker/Kubernetes) for large-scale image processing and inference.

 - Supporting workflow automation and debugging across distributed systems (e.g. Dagster, Argo, Kubeflow).

 - Building and extending frontend components for model management and result visualization (React.js or similar).

 - Collaborating with ML Scientists and Product Engineers to integrate AI models into production environments.
   
   

Your Responsibilities:

 - Architect and optimize database systems ensuring high reliability and performance.

 - Automate and monitor workflow execution for model training, calibration, and inference.

 - Maintain and document scalable CI/CD and deployment pipelines.

 - Ensure code quality, reproducibility, and clarity across all development processes.
   
   

Your Profile:

 - Strong experience in Full-Stack or Backend Development (Python, Django/FastAPI preferred).

 - Solid experience in database development (PostgreSQL, MySQL, or equivalent).

 - Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and Linux environments.

 - Bonus: Experience with Machine Learning integration (model APIs, inference pipelines).

 - Bonus: Familiarity with MLOps/DevOps tools (DVC, CI/CD, Dagster).

 - Bonus: Familiarity with frontend technologies (React.js or similar).

 - Strong communication skills, curiosity, and motivation to work in healthcare AI.



Why Mindpeak:

 - Join a mission-driven company developing AI that helps save lives and elevates cancer diagnostics worldwide.

 - Work in an open, creative environment with flat hierarchies, quick decisions, and close collaboration across disciplines.

 - Be part of a highly skilled, international team of engineers and scientists, guided by experienced leadership and united by impact.

 - Enjoy a centrally located Hamburg office with a stunning harbor view, and a culture that fosters continuous learning, autonomy, and collaboration.
   
   
   

Application Details:

We’d love to hear from you! Please send us your CV, university certificates, transcripts, references, salary expectations, and let us know your earliest possible start date.

You can reach us at jobs@mindpeak.ai. For more about us, visit mindpeak.ai.

 

Just a quick note: We’re only able to consider direct applications—agencies, please don’t apply. Thank you!

source_jobs.title: Senior Machine Learner
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based AI company developing state-of-the-art deep learning forcomputational pathology, with a clear mission: enabling more effective, personalized cancer treatment.

We work at the intersection of AI, medicine, and drug development, building regulatory-grade solutions that help pharma, biotech, and clinical partners discover, validate, and translate meaningful biomarkers into real-world impact.

Our technology analyzes H&E, IHC, and multiplex tissue data to support drug development, patient stratification, and clinical trials. What makes this work especially rewarding: Our AI is already deployed in routine diagnostics in more than 25 countries, meaning the tools we build are used by clinicians and patients every day.

At Mindpeak, we believe that reliable, clinically applicable AIimproves cancer treatment. If you want to work on challenging problems, collaborate across disciplines, and see your work make a real difference in patient care, you’ll feel at home here.




POSITION SUMMARY

As a Senior Machine Learner, you will be part of an interdisciplinary team and become a key driver in building highly accurate image analysis systems and machine learning models for both novel drug development and clinical routine. There are big challenges in the field of digital pathology like demanding accuracy requirements and the large variability of human cells. With your expertise and the possibilities of deep learning and artificial intelligence, you will work on solutions which will take the current healthcare to the next level and help generate a true impact beyond the status quo.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build the world’s best image analysis models in digital pathology using PyTorch.

 - Create and test prototypes of deep learning methods.

 - Develop these prototypes into deployed AI software models for our live environment.

 - Manage, preprocess, and analyze large image datasets for machine learning, and improve our data annotation pipelines for efficiency and quality.

 - Take the lead in challenging AI projects and inspire other MLers with your ideas and execution.

 - Collaborate closely with our tech team to build reliable and efficient AI software production systems.

 - Partner with our medical team to specify data needs for AI development and validation.

 - Work together with our product managers and pathology experts to develop new customer centric AI product concepts and identify AI requirements.
   
   
   


YOUR PROFILE

 - M.Sc / P.hD in Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics or similar with excellent grades.

 - Expert theoretical knowledge in machine learning.

 - Multi-year practical experience in deep learning for computer vision with PyTorch.

 - Technical skills to productionize and deploy neural network models for live environments.

 - Experience in using agentic AI tools for prototyping and software engineering

 - Enjoying interdisciplinary teamwork, thinking outside the box and communication with our partners.

 - Keen to understand how AI products can make a significant difference in users’ daily lives.

 - Independent structured working style and willingness to take responsibility.

 - Great analytical skills and the urge to constantly learn, mentor, and share knowledge along the way.

 - Deep knowledge of servers and IT infrastructure is a plus.

 - Interest in leading people is a plus.

 - Fluent in English, additional German is a plus.




WHAT MINDPEAK OFFERS

 - The opportunity to build AI systems that power both clinical cancer diagnostics and data-driven drug development.

 - An open, creative work environment with flat hierarchies and quick decision-making.

 - Diverse, engaging projects that help you deepen both your technical and domain expertise.

 - A centrally located Hamburg office with a beautiful view over the harbor.
   
   


APPLICATION DETAILS

Please send us:

 - CV

 - University certificates and transcripts of records

 - Job references

source_jobs.title: AI driven Senior Backend Developer Python (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW


Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based AI company dedicated to democratizing cancer diagnostics. Our software supports pathologists in detecting cancer faster and more accurately by applying state-of-the-art deep learning to medical images. Our AI solution is the first to be implemented in clinical histopathology for primary diagnostics in the USA and is used in routine workflows around the world.

We tackle a central challenge in modern healthcare: a growing demand for medical image analysis with a static number of cancer experts. By providing powerful, robust tools for visual diagnosis, we help pathologists focus on what only humans can do best—while our technology takes care of the rest.




POSITION SUMMARY


Role: AI driven (Senior) Backend Developer Python

Focus: Building and scaling high-quality backend services that power AI models and digital pathology tools. Establishing AI-agentic development workflows.

Team: You’ll be part of the development team, working closely with machine learning, product, and front-end colleagues. You will report directly to our VP Engineering.

Digital pathology comes with unique technical challenges: whole-slide images with file sizes of several gigabytes and resolutions up to 100,000 x 100,000 pixels. You’ll help design and implement solutions such as efficient image streaming via an advanced image server, ensuring that our AI models can be served reliably to pathologists, labs, and partners worldwide.

In this role, you will play a key part in building up Mindpeak’s AI agentic development knowledge, tooling, and workflows.

You’ll work on:

 - Building a new platform for digital pathology using a modern, multi-agent AI coding workflow.

 - Turning cutting-edge AI models into robust, scalable APIs for real-world clinical use

 - Building tools and services to automate our data annotation and image processing pipelines

 - Integrating scanners, image viewers, and lab information systems into seamless, automated workflows

 - Shaping and scaling AI-supported development workflows across teams

 - Shaping technical decisions from the ground up in a fast-moving, high-impact environment
   

Your Responsibilities

 - Design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and improve backend services that serve machine learning models in production.

 - Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code with a strong focus on reliability and performance.

 - Build automation tools to streamline and optimize our data annotation pipeline.

 - Work with technologies such as Docker, AWS, Python, and (partially) React to develop best-in-class digital pathology tools.

 - Integrate existing pathology hardware and software (e.g. scanners, image viewers, LIS) into automated workflows.

 - Manage your own project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables with a high degree of ownership.

 - Collaborate closely with product, design, front-end, deep learning, and infrastructure colleagues to keep everything running smoothly.

 - Select and implement the most effective technical approach for each task.

 - Build up AI agentic development workflows, including the evaluation and adoption of AI coding agents to improve developer productivity and software quality.

 - Define best practices for AI-assisted software development and share this knowledge across the organization.




YOUR PROFILE



Background & Experience

 - MSc in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

 - At least 3–5 years of professional experience with impactful contributions to software products.

 - Strong track record in backend development with Python.

 - Experience with Linux and Docker; Linux server administration/operations is a plus.

 - Extensive experience leading and mentoring junior developers.

 - Hands-on experience working with AI coding agents or AI-assisted development tools (e.g. agentic coding frameworks, LLM-based developer tools).

 - Experience in orchestrating AI coding agents

 - Experience wi

source_jobs.title: Senior Medical Project Manager (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
Company Overview
Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based scale-up at the forefront of AI-driven cancer diagnostics. Our software helps pathologists analyze medical images more efficiently and accurately - already clinically deployed in more than 25 countries. Our vision is to enable personalized and effective treatment for every cancer patient - to truly improve medical care and patient outcomes around the world.

Position Summary
Role: Senior Medical Project Manager

We are looking for a Senior Medical Project Manager who acts as the execution engine for Mindpeak’s clinical and pharmaceutical partnerships. In this role, you bridge the gap between complex biological science and high-speed software delivery. You will take full end-to-end ownership of our most important projects, ensuring they move from kickoff to completion through rigorous planning and superior stakeholder management.


Your mission is to ensure that complex project requirements turn into reliable, scalable execution. You are not just a coordinator; you are an operational architect. You build the backbone of our partnership delivery by introducing standardized workflows that make scaling predictable. You don't just follow a process—you improve it. When things go wrong, you don't offer excuses; you find creative solutions to keep the customer happy and the project on track.



You’ll work on:

 - Driving High-Stakes Projects: Leading pharma partnerships with zero "hand-holding" and full accountability for results.

 - Scaling Operations: Reducing onboarding times and automating repetitive tasks to move from 25 labs in 2026 to 100+ in 2027.

 - Bridging Science & Tech: Translating clinical requirements and pathology results into technical requirements for our engineering teams.

 - Maintaining Excellence: Ensuring high-quality delivery while navigating the high-pressure environment of a fast-growing AI startup.
   

What You’ll Do:

Project Governance & Execution

 - Lead the end-to-end delivery of high-priority pharmaceutical and clinical projects.

 - Identify "red flags" (data bottlenecks, regulatory hurdles) weeks in advance and implement mitigation plans.

 - Balance partner "feature creep" with internal resources, ensuring commitments are met without compromising quality.

Stakeholder Architecture

 - Act as a trusted, "high-presentability" advisor to our Pharma partners.

 - Navigate difficult conversations regarding delays or technical limitations while maintaining excellent long-term relationships.

 - Keep the customer happy through proactive communication and solution-oriented management.

Process Engineering & Scalability

 - Identify inefficiencies in internal workflows and implement standardized documentation to reduce manual overhead.

 - Aim for radical efficiency: reduce onboarding time for new partners to less than one hour.

 - Connect scientific needs to the product roadmap to ensure long-term business value.

Scientific & Analytical Leadership

 - Interpret IHC/pathology results and translate them for the engineering team.

 - Apply the "80/20 rule": know when a project requires 100% scientific depth and when pragmatic speed is needed to hit a commercial deadline.



Candidate Profile

 - Science-Tech Hybrid: Master’s degree in Biology, Molecular Biology, Biomedical Sciences, or a related field, combined with a "software-native" mindset.

 - Proven PM Toolkit: 5+ years of professional experience in project management, ideally in Biotech, Pharma, or MedTech.

 - Execution Drive: You take full responsibility for outcomes. No excuses—you find a way to get it done.

 - Operational Mindset: A natural discomfort with "messy" folders or manual tasks; you have a drive to automate and standardize.

 - Communication: C1/C2 English level; confident in negotiating with and presenting to high-level external stakeholders.

 - Pragmatic Thinker: You stay calm under pressure and handle shifting priorities with ease.

 - Nice-to-Have: A PhD in Pathology/Histology, basic

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer Python (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW


Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based AI company applying state-of-the-art deep learning to computational pathology, with a clear mission: enabling more effective, personalized cancer treatment.

We work at the intersection of AI, medicine, and drug development-building regulatory-grade solutions that help pharma, biotech, and clinical partners discover, validate, and translate meaningful biomarkers into real-world impact.

Our technology analyzes H&E, IHC, and multiplex tissue data to support drug development, patient stratification, and clinical trials. What makes this work especially rewarding: our AI is already deployed in routine diagnostics in more than 25 countries, meaning the tools we build are used by clinicians and patients every day.

At Mindpeak, we believe that reliable, clinically applicable AI can change how cancer is treated. If you want to work on challenging problems, collaborate across disciplines, and see your work make a real difference in patient care, you’ll feel at home here.

Team: You’ll be part of the development team, working closely with machine learning, product, and front-end colleagues. You will report directly to our VP Engineering.

Digital pathology comes with unique technical challenges: whole-slide images with file sizes of several gigabytes and resolutions up to 100,000 x 100,000 pixels. Your Responsibilities

source_jobs.title: Chief of Staff
source_jobs.description:
THE ROLE

We are looking for a high-energy, execution leader with strong medical domain expertise to join our leadership team as Chief of Staff, reporting directly to the Founder & CEO.

This is not a traditional "administrative" Chief of Staff role. It is a high-impact, strategic, and operational position designed for someone who can act as the CEO’s right hand and "force multiplier." You will bridge the gap between vision and reality, ensuring that Mindpeak’s strategic objectives are translated into operational excellence across the entire organization.




YOUR MISSION

Your mission is to ensure that strategy turns into reliable execution.

You will act as the connective tissue of the company, ensuring that the CEO’s priorities are communicated, owned, and delivered. You are someone who thrives in the "gray area" between departments—medical, regulatory, engineering, and commercial—bringing clarity where there is ambiguity and momentum where there is friction.



This means:

 - Driving the CEO’s Agenda: Ensuring top-level priorities are met through relentless follow-through.

 - Operational Architecture: Building and refining the operating rhythms (OKRs, leadership meetings, cross-functional syncs) that keep a scaling AI company focused.

 - Medical & Domain Alignment: Bringing medical relevance into high-level decision-making to ensure our AI impacts clinical reality.

 - Executing Special Projects: Taking ownership of "first-of-their-kind" initiatives that don't yet have a natural home in the organization.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Strategic Partnership & Execution

 - CEO Sparring Partner: Act as a sounding board for the CEO on organizational design, scaling decisions, and product direction.

 - Priority Management: Filter and prioritize the CEO’s time and focus, ensuring the leadership team stays aligned on the "Vital Few" goals.

 - Meeting Architecture: Design and lead leadership offsites, board preparations, and weekly management meetings to maximize decision-making speed.

Operational Excellence

 - Scaling the Backbone: Introduce pragmatic, software-native processes that allow us to grow from 50 to 100+ employees without losing our soul or speed.

 - Interdisciplinary Glue: Break down silos between medical, engineering, and regulatory teams to ensure "the PS get on the road" and stay there.

 - Accountability Loops: Ensure that once a decision is made, it is sustainably implemented, followed, and measured.

Medical & Domain Leadership

 - Clinical Translation: Ensure our strategic roadmap reflects real-world clinical workflows and the rigorous demands of pathology and drug development.




YOUR PROFILE

 - Execution Powerhouse: You have shown that you can execute in challenging environments.

 - Force Multiplier: While the CEO is great at the "Zero to One" (the vision and the kickoff), you thrive on the "One to N" (the execution)

 - Mindset: Hands-on, and decisive. You don't just design frameworks; you stay until they work.

 - Language: Fluent in English.

 - Location: Based in Hamburg.
   
   


WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR

 - Pure Strategy Consultants: If you prefer building decks over building organizations, this isn't for you.

 - Administrators: This is an execution role, not a personal assistant or traditional office manager position.




WHY MINDPEAK

 - Impact: Build AI systems that power both clinical cancer diagnostics and data-driven drug development.

 - Culture: An open, creative environment with flat hierarchies and a focus on continuous development.

 - Leadership Development: Join a leadership team that invests in itself through regular workshops and peer coaching.

 - Location: A centrally located Hamburg office with a beautiful view over the harbor.

 - Ownership: We offer an equity component in the compensation, reflecting the strategic importance of this role.
   
   


APPLICATION DETAILS

Please send us:

 1. Your CV

 2. Job references

 3. Salary expectations and earliest possible starting date

source_jobs.title: Working Student Office Management Support (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

Mindpeak is a Hamburg-based AI company dedicated to democratizing cancer diagnostics. Our software supports pathologists in detecting cancer faster and more accurately by applying state-of-the-art deep learning to medical images. Our AI solution is the first to be implemented in clinical histopathology for primary diagnostics in the USA and is used in routine workflows around the world.

We tackle a central challenge in modern healthcare: a growing demand for medical image analysis with a static number of cancer experts. By providing powerful, robust tools for visual diagnosis, we help pathologists focus on what only humans can do best—while our technology takes care of the rest.

The Role

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Office Management Student to support our Management and Operations team. In this role, you will be a key contact person for the entire team, giving you exposure to diverse business areas where you can apply your strengths. This position offers a valuable opportunity to work in an agile, innovative environment and directly contribute to our company's success.



Your Responsibilities

 - Executive Support: Assist the management and operations team in day-to-day operations, including scheduling, meeting organization, and document preparation.

 - Travel Management: Coordinate travel bookings such as flights, accommodation, and local transport.

 - Office Management: Manage administrative tasks including filing, ordering office supplies, and general office organization.

 - Event Planning: Support the organization of internal and external company events, team-building activities, and large-scale meetings.

 - Ad-hoc Projects: Provide support for various spontaneous projects as they arise.





YOUR PROFILE

 - Experience: Experience as an Office Assistant, Management Assistant, or in a comparable administrative role is a plus.

 - Motivation: High level of commitment and the drive to bring your skills to a mission-driven AI health company.

 - Organization: Excellent organizational and time-management skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively in a dynamic environment.

 - Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills in both German and English.

 - Tech Savvy: Proficient with Microsoft Office / Google Docs and modern scheduling tools.
